action.code: function(){ return { url: String(location.href||''), title: String(document.title||''), ts: Date.now() }; }

action.prompt: 判断当前页面是否已经是“当前登录用户自己的个人主页/Profile页（my profile）”，不是首页/发现页，也不是他人的主页。只返回结构化结果。

action.conclusion: ${{ ({ dest: vars.navCtx?.destKey || '', url: vars.verifyOut?.url || '', title: vars.verifyOut?.title || '', via: vars.navSel?.by || null, assisted: false }) }}
${{ ({ dest: vars.navCtx?.destKey || '', url: vars.verifyAfterAssistOut?.url || '', title: vars.verifyAfterAssistOut?.title || '', via: vars.navSel?.by || null, assisted: true }) }}
